v_quad_pipeline_does_not_recover_known_P.interpretation: NOT a contradiction with prior claims.  V_quad's known P-III(D6) reduction comes from the Borel-resummation Stokes-constant ODE (claims.jsonl line 179, t2_iter18), NOT from the recurrence-parameter L(t) deformation.  The L(t) deformation is a DIFFERENT analytic deformation channel.  This Session D establishes that the L(t) channel does NOT carry a Painleve reduction for any of the six families.
